title: T-073 — tenant-scoped JIT provisioning flag wired to signInWithMagicLink.shouldCreateUser (FT-013)
prompt:
# T-073 — tenant-scoped JIT provisioning flag wired to signInWithMagicLink.shouldCreateUser (FT-013)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5.x, §8.x
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-013** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P2** (S effort)

## Goal
Wire jit_provisioning per-tenant flag to Supabase signInWithMagicLink.shouldCreateUser.

## Implementation contract
1. magic-link.ts reads tenant_idp_config.jit_provisioning for the org bound to the email's domain (or explicit org).
2. Calls supabase.auth.signInWithMagicLink({ ..., options: { shouldCreateUser: !!jitFlag } }).
3. Default when no tenant_idp_config row: false (deny-by-default).
4. Test asserts both branches.

## Files (scope)
- packages/auth/src/magic-link.ts [modify]
- packages/auth/src/__tests__/magic-link-jit.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given tenant_idp_config.jit_provisioning=true, when signInWithMagicLink is invoked, then shouldCreateUser=true is passed.
2. Given tenant_idp_config.jit_provisioning=false (or no row), when signInWithMagicLink is invoked, then shouldCreateUser=false is passed.

## Test strategy
- RED: write magic-link-jit.test.ts asserting both branches before refactor.
- Mock supabase admin client via vi.fn().
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/auth test magic-link-jit`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not default to shouldCreateUser=true when org has no tenant_idp_config row.
- Do not skip cross-tenant binding (email belongs to one org).

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Honor tenant_idp_config.jit_provisioning when calling signInWithMagicLink so the shouldCreateUser flag reflects per-tenant policy.
pipeline_inputs.details: signInWithMagicLink currently hardcodes shouldCreateUser:true. Read tenant_idp_config.jit_provisioning for the relevant org and pass it through.
out_of_scope: Do not change SAML JIT logic in this task.

Given tenant_idp_config.jit_provisioning=false (or no row), when signInWithMagicLink is invoked, then shouldCreateUser=false is passed.
